title: Pipestation 15mm Compression Elbow Connectors (Pack of 2) | Durable Compression Joint Plumbing Fittings for Copper Plumbing Pipe Connectors | 15mm Chrome Compressions Plumbers Pipe Fitting
features: BEST VALUE PACK - Get 2 Brass Compression Elbows from Pipestation, offering unbeatable value for your plumbing projects. Perfect for 10mm pipe-work jobs, whether for home or commercial use.
EASY TO INSTALL - Our WRAS approved compression fittings require no soldering, ensuring hassle-free installation. Save time and effort with our user-friendly compression elbow connectors.
SOLID BRASS CONSTRUCTION - Crafted from solid brass and manufactured to EN1254 standards, our compression elbows are highly durable and corrosion-resistant. Built to last in demanding environments.

VERSATILE APPLICATION - These chrome compression elbow connectors are commonly used to connect copper pipes for water systems, providing a reliable and leak-proof joint. Versatility for various plumbing needs.
WHAT YOU GET - Each pack includes 2 high-quality 15mm Chrome Compression Elbow Connectors from Pipestation. Trust in our product for secure and long-lasting plumbing installations.
